overview: Houston Concierge Medicine provides comprehensive primary care and integrative medical services with personalized treatment approaches focused on preventive medicine and wellness. The practice emphasizes understanding each patient's unique health needs and building sustainable healthy habits.
highlights: Concierge membership model with personalized primary care
Comprehensive diagnostic testing and screening (cancer detection, cardiac health, body composition, metabolic rate testing)
targetAudience: Individuals seeking comprehensive primary care with emphasis on preventive medicine, executive health assessment, and longevity optimization.
